rationale: Sophisticated adversarial: function has non-trivial body and returns varying value (`r` is computed, modified, returned). Both triviality and return-value-constancy checks PASS — axis-1 trusts the WUR and fires EXPLOITABLE. Ground truth: caller has no actionable use of the return — the function's return value is meaningless. DOCUMENTED RESIDUAL GAP: this shape requires semantic understanding of return-value meaning, which is beyond structural analysis. Stage D LLM (or human review) is the intended defense layer. F1 leak EXPECTED.
